title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #2 as powerful fighters clash in the Colosseum and the scale of the tournament becomes clearer through Elizabello, Chinjao, and the other competitors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even though I promised frankly I wouldn't let anyone know who I was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Squad Commander of Dressrosa's Self Defense Army!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Tank LePanto is out of the running!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He fell prey to the brutality of Abdullah and Ject!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Nothing but dirty tricks from them

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: In no time at all, over 100 contestants have been eliminated

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just a bit more...! no matter which troublesome bastards are still standing, as long as we have the King punch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone is assaulting that brutal pair!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How cruel!! How atrocious!! It's like those words...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, take a look!! That fishman is strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's been racking up one-hit ko's for a while now!!! How cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's another man smashing through the competition exclusively!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
